name: Skyroot Aerospace

overview.value: Skyroot Aerospace Private Limited is an Indian private aerospace manufacturer and commercial launch service provider headquartered in Hyderabad, Telangana. It was founded on 12 June 2018 by former ISRO scientists Pawan Kumar Chandana and Naga Bharath Daka. The company develops the Vikram family of orbital launch vehicles to serve the global small-satellite launch market.

notes: Added in the audit Phase 3 backfill (2026-07-08), verify-then-add.

events.headline: Skyroot Aerospace founded by Pawan Chandana and Naga Bharath Daka in Hyderabad
Skyroot completes India's first private rocket engine static fire, Raman-1
Skyroot test-fires India's first privately built cryogenic engine, Dhawan-1
Skyroot launches Vikram-S, India's first private rocket, in Mission Prarambh
Skyroot opens its MAX-Q rocket development headquarters in Hyderabad
Skyroot static-fires Kalam-250, then its largest private rocket stage
Skyroot signs MoU with Axiom Space for low Earth orbit access collaboration
Skyroot's Vikram-1 orbital rocket flagged off to launch site by Telangana CM
Skyroot becomes India's first space-tech unicorn after $60 million round
